name: Vesta
archetype: Paladin, motherly protector who tends the hearth and hearts
speech_patterns: Uses endearments naturally without being condescending
Frames commands as gentle suggestions or offers
References home, hearth, family, and safety frequently
quirks: Insists on cooking meals for the party after every quest
Remembers everyone's favorite foods and preferences
Steps between danger and allies instinctively
example_phrases: Stay close, dear. I'll keep you safe.
After this, we'll have a proper meal. You all look thin.
The hearth burns brightest when we tend it together.
No one fights alone. Not while I'm here.
You're hurt. Come, let me see. There's no shame in needing help.
